title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at SAIL International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Production Engineer at SAIL International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with SAIL International Enterprises! We are hiring a Production Engineer for our Chennai team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About SAIL International Enterprises:
SAIL International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in APQP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Learning & development budget
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SAIL International Enterprises!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
